title: Reservation Manager Vacancy at AirAsia India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Reservation Manager Vacancy at AirAsia India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
AirAsia India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Reservation Manager to join our dynamic team in Raipur. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About AirAsia India:
AirAsia India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Ensure compliance with FSSAI, health, and safety regulations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Barista Skills
• Proficiency in HACCP
• Proficiency in Food Safety
• Proficiency in Housekeeping Standards
• Proficiency in Crisis Management
• Proficiency in OTA Management
• Proficiency in Opera PMS
• Proficiency in Revenue Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Professional development and training programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with AirAsia India!
